revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Taiwan | flag alias = Flag of the Republic of China.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Republic of China Army.svg | link alias-army = Republic of China Army | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Republic of China Air Force.svg | link alias-air force = Republic of China Air Force | link alias-naval = Republic of China Navy | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the Republic of China.svg | flag alias-japan = Flag of Japan (1870-1999).svg | link alias-japan = Taiwan under Japanese rule | flag alias-navy = Naval Jack of the Republic of China.svg | link alias-navy = Republic of China Navy | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Republic of China Marine Corps.svg | link alias-marines = Republic of China Marine Corps | flag alias-coast guard = Flag of the Coast Guard Administration of the Republic of China.svg | link alias-coast guard = Coast Guard Administration | link alias-football = Chinese Taipei {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} football {{{class|}}} team | link alias-basketball = Chinese Taipei {{{mw}}} national {{{age|}}} basketball team | link alias-rugby union = Chinese Taipei {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} rugby union team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|Republic of China|Taiwan|{{{name|}}}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | hatnote = {{For|associated data|Template:Country data Republic of China}} | redir1 = TWN | var1 = civil | var2 = japan | related1 = Republic of China | related2 = Chinese Taipei </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Taiwan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Taiwan for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Taiwan | flag alias = Flag of the Republic of China.svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Republic of China Army.svg | link alias-army = Republic of China Army | flag alias-air force = Flag of the Republic of China Air Force.svg | link alias-air force = Republic of China Air Force | link alias-naval = Republic of China Navy | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the Republic of China.svg | flag alias-japan = Flag of Japan (1870-1999).svg | link alias-japan = Taiwan under Japanese rule | flag alias-navy = Naval Jack of the Republic of China.svg | link alias-navy = Republic of China Navy | flag alias-marines = Flag of the Republic of China Marine Corps.svg | link alias-marines = Republic of China Marine Corps | flag alias-coast guard = Flag of the Coast Guard Administration of the Republic of China.svg | link alias-coast guard = Coast Guard Administration | link alias-football = Chinese Taipei {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} football {{{class|}}} team | link alias-basketball = Chinese Taipei {{{mw}}} national {{{age|}}} basketball team | link alias-rugby union = Chinese Taipei {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} rugby union team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{#ifeq:{{{name|}}}|Republic of China|Taiwan|{{{name|}}}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | hatnote = {{For|associated data|Template:Country data Republic of China}} | redir1 = TWN | var1 = civil | var2 = japan | related1 = Republic of China | related2 = Chinese Taipei </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
